name: Carter Bankshares, Inc.
summary: General Carter Bankshares, Inc. (the Company) is a bank holding company headquartered in Martinsville, Virginia with assets of $4.9 billion at December31, 2025.In October 2025, the Company elected to become a financial holding company under the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956, as amended (the BHCA). As a financial holding company of a Virginia state bank, the Company is subject to regulation, supervision and examination by the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (the FRB) and the B...
